label: How it works
title: Your creative process,
subtitle: Content Intelligence doesn't tell you what to create. It shows you how to get more from what you already have, discover your creative patterns, and open possibilities you hadn't seen.

convert.title: Turn your idea into content
convert.line1: Choose an idea, define who it's for and where.
convert.line2: Get a brief so you can produce without starting from scratch.

insights.title: Insights and your creative DNA
insights.line1: Discover opportunities to evolve your content
insights.line2: based on the topics, formats and rhythms that work best for you.

grow.title: The platform grows with you
grow.line1: The more you create, the better it knows you.
